scripts.dev: npm run i18n:generate && npm run agent:generate && vite --host 127.0.0.1
scripts.build: npm run i18n:generate && npm run i18n:validate && npm run agent:generate && npm run agent:validate && npm run clean:metadata && npm run assets:build && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.visual:baseline: npm run build && VISUAL_UPDATE_BASELINE=1 node scripts/visual-regression.mjs
scripts.visual:roadmap: npm run build && VISUAL_ROUTES=roadmap VISUAL_VIEWPORTS=mobile-390,tablet-1024,desktop-1632 node scripts/visual-regression.mjs
scripts.check:quick: npm run i18n:generate && npm run agent:generate && npm run agent:validate && npm run typecheck
scripts.check:build: npm run build && npm run paused:guard && npm run perf:budget
scripts.check:i18n: npm run i18n:generate && npm run i18n:validate && npm run i18n:report
scripts.check:i18n-rendered: npm run build && npm run i18n:audit-rendered
scripts.check:roadmap: npm run check:quick && npm run build && I18N_AUDIT_ROUTES=roadmap npm run i18n:audit-rendered
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run paused:guard && npm run i18n:audit-rendered && npm run perf:budget
